title: Momentum Swarm Manifest
description: Declares a cross-repo work unit driven from one user (conductor) session. Lives at <ecosystem-root>/swarms/<id>/manifest.json. The saga record — repos, waves, owner/lease, contract pins, token budgets, audit. All conductor + supervisor writes go through mkdir-locked CRUD in core/swarm/lib/manifest.js.

swarm_id.description: Zero-padded NNNN- prefix plus kebab slug, e.g. 0007-user-auth. Matches the on-disk directory name.

saga_id.description: Opaque short identifier (sg_<hex>) — used in dispatch-run records to associate per-repo saga steps with this swarm.

mode.description: Conductor intervention mode. v0.20.0 ships autopilot + checkpoint; interactive reserved for v0.20.x.

initiative.description: Slug of the cross-repo initiative this swarm advances. Must reference a real <eco>/initiatives/NNNN-<slug>.md.

created.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the swarm was started.

ecosystem.description: Ecosystem name (mirrors ecosystem.json name). Defensive copy — lets a swarm survive an ecosystem rename without losing context.

repos.description: Per-repo swarm state, keyed by ecosystem member id.

wave.description: Wave index this repo is assigned to. Computed from ecosystem.json dependency edges at start; immutable per swarm.

status.description: Current execution status. Materialized into board.json.

phase_slug.description: The phase directory slug inside this repo (e.g. phase-3-user-auth). The supervisor's /start-phase loop drives this phase.

branch.description: Git branch the supervisor commits to in this repo. Defaults to phase-N-<slug>.

owner.description: Session id (UUID-like) currently authoritative for this repo. Portability hook — Phase 17.5 lights up lease enforcement.

lease_expires_at.description: When the current owner's lease expires. Conductor renews each turn. Phase 17.5 enforces; v0.20.0 audits only.

lease_renewed_at.description: Last time the owner refreshed the lease. Conductor writes each conductor turn for repos it owns.

claimed_by_session.description: Session UUID that holds the active claim. Mirrors brief frontmatter claimed_by_session.

last_seen_sha.description: Last HEAD SHA the conductor observed for this repo. Cheap revalidation: if rev-parse HEAD matches, cache is fresh.

tasks_done.description: Number of supervisor checklist items completed.

tasks_total.description: Total checklist size at supervisor spawn time.

tokens_used.description: Output tokens spent by this supervisor (approximate, supervisor-reported).

tokens_budget.description: Hard cap on supervisor output tokens. /swarm budget extends. Default 300000.

inbox_count.description: Count of unresolved inbox items written by this supervisor.

commits.description: Number of git commits the supervisor has pushed on its branch.

current_task.description: Free-form label of what the supervisor is working on right now.

waiting_on.description: Member ids this repo's supervisor is blocked on. Used in board.json rendering for queued repos.

contract_refs.description: Contract surfaces this repo produces or consumes — slugs that resolve to contracts/<slug>.contract.json.

waves.description: Ordered wave plan. Each entry lists the member ids in that wave. Waves execute sequentially; repos within a wave run in parallel.

checkpoint_resolved_at.description: When the user approved the wave checkpoint (checkpoint mode). Null/missing in autopilot.

sessions.description: Registry of every conductor session that has touched this swarm. Portability hook — Phase 17.5 uses for join/absorb.

contracts.description: Cross-repo contract surfaces pinned at start. Each references contracts/<surface>.contract.json. Mismatches at wave boundaries block the next wave.

audit.description: Append-only audit log: /swarm tell, /swarm broadcast, /swarm budget, /swarm cancel, /swarm verify events. Materialized into board.json as recent_activity.

status.description: Overall swarm state. Derived from per-repo + wave statuses; materialized into board.json.
